customers_say: Customers find the water purifier provides good quality water and appreciate its installation process. However, the reliability is mixed, with some reporting it stops working completely. Moreover, durability is a concern as filters break within 6 months and internal parts fail frequently. Additionally, customers report issues with noise, including loud sounds and vibrations, and water leakage problems. The value for money and service receive mixed reviews, with some finding it a good affordable purifier while others say it's not worth the cost, and some praising the service while others report poor service.

reviews.author: Jebastin
reviews.title: Disappointed with Product Quality and Customer Support
reviews.body: **⭐ 1 Star – Very Disappointed** I purchased this KENT RO Water Purifier from Amazon in June 2026 for **₹15,599**, and I also spent an additional **₹1,500** on the filter. Unfortunately, my experience has been very disappointing. The water does not taste good, and the purifier has not been working properly. I raised a service complaint with KENT customer support in the Tambaram area, but I have not received a proper response or timely service. The after-sales support has been poor, and my issue remains still unresolved. I invested a total of over **₹17,000**, but I am not satisfied with the pr

reviews.author: Gopikrishna
reviews.title: Kent Supreme Plus Water Purifier: Delivery & Installation
reviews.body: The product is good. Amazon delivery superb. The installation is a big drag. had a tough time in scheduling installation. The technician comes without requisite plumbing items. Btw, learnt during a installation that you need to purchase the pre-water filter seperately.

reviews.author: naveen
reviews.title: Excellent water purifier
reviews.body: A very good and usefull product. Delivery and installation was great.

reviews.author: Pradeep Mani
reviews.title: Good product and fast installation and demo
reviews.body: Excellent Installation and demo is good

reviews.author: Boreddy Anvesh Reddy
reviews.title: Kent product review
reviews.body: Good product and good service and technician is kind and best service
